9. ~~popular(black_mirror) [negated conjecture 8]
10. popular(black_mirror) [flattening 9]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 3]
13. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : ((binge_watch(X0) <=> download(X0)) | ~netflix_show(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
15. ! [X0] : (((binge_watch(X0) | ~download(X0)) & (download(X0) | ~binge_watch(X0))) | ~netflix_show(X0)) [nnf transformation 14]
20. ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | binge_watch(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
21. ~binge_watch(X0) | download(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
23. ~download(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 5]
24. netflix_show(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 6]
25. popular(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 10]
26. ~netflix_show(black_mirror) | binge_watch(black_mirror) [resolution 20,25]
29. binge_watch(black_mirror) [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
30. download(black_mirror) | ~netflix_show(black_mirror) [resolution 21,29]

32. $false [forward subsumption resolution 31,24]
